name: finishing-a-development-branch
tagline: Guides finishing a dev branch: verify tests, detect worktree state, offer merge/PR/keep/discard, and clean up safely.
verdict: Safety-conscious workflow skill: gates destructive actions (branch delete, worktree removal) behind test verification and typed confirmation, deterministic option menus. Minor gaps: no stated out-of-scope guidance and no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or out-of-scope section anywhere; multi-step git workflow with no scope guard.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the skill.
